i did all the market research so you don't have to. All values are not including events or rewards from main story.

Sediments (Monthly): F2P ~460, advanced topics + moonlight ~874
This is still not enough to buy Protoype Horizon, Timeloop Copy, so sediments actually become very tight outside of events. be frugal

Badges (Monthly): 6700
Gnosis fragments alone are 5000. you do get a lot from the story.

Lightless (Monthly): 19000 go crazy

D-Jewel (Monthly): 40000
after Dreamspark and Dreamshard you have 17200 a month remaining.
You have to wait for events to come by that offer those
